publishedAbstract: - How does OCS/ODF behaves when reporting storage usage?- Why is the "raw" storage usage so much higher than the actual storage usage?- Do I need to provision more storage? On this document we provide command outputs from an OCS cluster of 3 nodes with one disk of 512GB (used by ceph osd) on each OCS node, that means ceph cluster will have 1.5TB of RAW size
publishedTitle: OCS size - Raw Storage used much higher than actual usage in OCS - fstrim on Ceph RBD
